source.name: Lab 2.1: sub_agents/banking_assistant/config.yml (fill-in-the-blanks)
source.instructions: **Fill in the blanks** to complete the sub-agent config. **After you pass:** save the completed YAML as **`level6/sub_agents/banking_assistant/config.yml`** (create the folder if needed), then run the **Code Test** (the next assessment).
source.text:
```yaml
agent:
  name: <<<banking_assistant>>>
  protocol: <<<RASA>>>
  description: "Helps users with balance checks, transfers, and banking questions using MCP tools."

configuration:
  llm:
    model_group: <<<gpt-4o-mini>>>
  module: actions.banking_assistant_lite_agent.<<<BankingAssistantLiteAgent>>>

connections:
  mcp_servers:
    - name: <<<banking_mcp>>>
```
source.distractors:
banking_mcp
main_agent
OPENAI
openai
react
BankingMainAgent
MCPOpenAgent
rasa/command-generator
8080
gpt-4o
banking_tools
source.guidance: **`agent.name`** must be **`banking_assistant`** (matches **`call: banking_assistant`** in Lab 4.1). **`protocol`** is **`RASA`**. **`model_group`** must match **`endpoints.yml`** (**`gpt-4o-mini`**). **`module`** ends with **`BankingAssistantLiteAgent`** (provided in **`actions/`**). **`mcp_servers`** name **`banking_mcp`** must match what you register in **`endpoints.yml`** (Lab 3.1). Indentation: two spaces per level. **After you pass,** save as **`level6/sub_agents/banking_assistant/config.yml`**, then run the **Code Test**.
